title: Set Status based on timeline

posts.author: Fra_Cose_88 (Francesco Cosentino)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I would need to change status, based on timeline. This is what I used on excel.
Basically, based on the project end date, I can see if a resourse is Busy, Free, or when will be free.

Screenshot 2023-11-18 at 17.33.332328×708 94.9 KB

Screenshot 2023-11-18 at 17.36.411968×374 50.5 KB

My variable is the status.

Any suggestions? Thanks!
